scope: D1-A framing + D1-B1 bodies (01/60/62/64/7d) + D1-B2 bodies (10/11/20-25 service+txn admission) + D1-B3a body (26 SCHEDULER_OWNER) + D1-B3b body (27 ORDERED_INGRESS) + message_semantic_digest helper + D1-B3c body (30 BLOB manifest/chunk) + D1-B3d body (31 ATTEMPT) + D1-B3e body (34 ATTEMPT_ID_INDEX) + D1-B3f body (33 CANCEL_STATE); not full D1 catalog
required_workspace_bytes_definition: Additional caller-provided scratch beyond explicit inputs, outputs, and state/context objects. Current D1-A/D1-B1/D1-B2/D1-B3a/D1-B3b/D1-B3c/D1-B3d/D1-B3e/D1-B3f APIs have no workspace parameter; value is 0.

vectors.notes: UINT64_MAX-7 message bits; padding not counted against message limit
NULL data with nonzero length via body_length sentinel
primary_key_digest must be KEY_DIGEST(complete key), not sha256(id)
primary_id must be referenced primary, not scheduler self-key
non-zero payload_blob_key_digest; semantic non-zero; BLOB recompute D3
one-shot empty payload/evidence from body prefix
non-final length 3072; multi content not local recompute
multi-chunk content digest not locally recomputed from one chunk
owner_primary_key_digest must be KEY_DIGEST not sha256(id)
chunk primary_id is manifest composite first 16
multi-chunk content_digest must be non-zero; no local recompute
stored chunk blob_id_digest must be non-zero
attempt_record_key_digest must be non-zero complete-key KEY_DIGEST
bare composite digest is not KEY_DIGEST(complete ATTEMPT key)
sha256(attempt_id) alone is not KEY_DIGEST(complete ATTEMPT key)
record key digest derived from wrong transaction_id
record key digest derived from wrong attempt_id
DELIVERY-owned ATTEMPT complete-key digest is not valid for index
key ID128 must equal body attempt_id
primary_id must be transaction_id not attempt_id
shape2 TX PENDING CLOSED zero timeout (pre-send crash/denial)
shape2 TX PENDING CLOSED active timeout pair
shape3 TX FENCED local pre-dispatch zero pair
shape4 TX FENCED remote result NZ pair CLOSED
ALREADY_TERMINAL not a legal stored kind for FENCED
attempt NZ but digest zero illegal
digest NZ but attempt zero illegal
TX FENCED zero pair requires NEVER not CLOSED
TX FENCED NZ pair requires CLOSED
timeout epoch NZ requires at_ms NZ
timeout at_ms NZ requires epoch NZ
primary_key_digest must be non-zero complete KEY_DIGEST
primary_key_digest must equal KEY_DIGEST of complete primary key
bare composite identity is not KEY_DIGEST(complete DELIVERY key)
key COMPOSITE must match body owner
key must be SHA256_COMPOSITE not ID128
primary_id must be transaction_id not self composite
